target.title: [codex] fix reasoning tag leakage
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89473.

- Treat `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` as reasoning-control tags in the shared final assistant text sanitizer.
- Keep existing `<think>` unclosed recovery behavior, but do not recover unclosed reasoning-only content as visible assistant text.
- Add focused sanitizer and `extractAssistantText` regressions for closed reasoning tags.

## Root Cause

The stream partitioner already recognized `reasoning` tags, but the final delivery sanitizer only matched think/thinking/thought variants. That allowed final assistant text and extracted assistant history text to deliver raw `<reasoning>...</reasoning>` blocks.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Assistant-visible final text now strips hidden `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` blocks through the shared sanitizer used by assistant text extraction.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this draft PR branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `git diff --check`; `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 2 files / 108 tests; `git diff --check` passed; `oxfmt --check` passed.

Observed result after fix: Closed regular and namespaced reasoning tags are stripped from visible assistant text; unclosed reasoning-only content stays hidden instead of being recovered as visible text.

What was not tested: Full repository suite, broad changed checks, GitHub CI, and additional post-shrink autoreview were not run locally for this draft PR.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts`
